metadata.name: Get Tax Return Transcript for Mortgage Application

description: A taxpayer is applying for a mortgage and the lender requires official IRS transcripts of their last two tax returns.

nodes.task_description: Gather the taxpayer's information and the specific tax years needed.
Access the IRS 'Get Transcript' online tool on behalf of the taxpayer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully logs in to the IRS portal.

nodes.task_description: Download the tax return transcripts for the required years and provide them to the taxpayer to give to their lender.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully obtains and delivers the official IRS documents.
